en-US.title: RallyZone
en-US.subtitle: Mental Fitness for Veterans
en-US.description:
RallyZone is a mental performance and emotional regulation tool built for veterans and high-stress individuals who want practical tools — not another wellness app.

Track your mental readiness with daily Morning and Evening Briefs. Log mood, energy, and sleep with a quick check-in and see 30-day patterns at a glance on your heatmap.

CORE FEATURES

• Morning & Evening Brief — Daily mood, energy, and sleep check-in. See your 30-day history on a color-coded heatmap.

• Trigger Log — Record events, reactions, and intensity levels. Capture optional reflections to understand what's driving your stress response.

• Calm Tools — Practical grounding and regulation techniques for high-stress moments.

• Pattern Insights (Premium) — Aggregate analytics across your mood and trigger logs to identify recurring patterns over time.

• Secure Vault (Premium) — Biometric-locked private notes protected with Face ID or fingerprint. No cloud, no risk.

• PDF Export (Premium) — Generate 30, 60, or 90-day reports with your call sign for sharing with a provider or counselor.

BUILT FOR OPERATORS

RallyZone is designed for veterans who operate under pressure and need to track their mental state without the fluff.

Privacy-first. Your data stays on your device. No accounts required.

review.notes: RallyZone is a mental performance tracking app. No login required — all data is stored locally on device. Premium features (Vault, Insights, PDF Export) require a subscription and are gated behind biometric authentication or a RevenueCat paywall. To test premium: use the restore purchases flow or contact the developer for a test account.
